"[4] [20:50:54 GMT-08:00 05 Mar 2026] (626) 476-5019 has entered the chat[20:50:54 GMT-08:00 05 Mar 2026] (626) 476-5019: A user is requesting emergency services from an Apple device via satellite. Transmit and receive times may be longer than for cellular SMS. User responses may be delayed due to satellite movements.The user CANNOT MAKE OR RECEIVE A VOICE CALL because they are outside cellular coverage.At 04:50AM UTC, YUNTAO JIAN requested emergency services near these coordinates: Latitude 34.1758 (N), Longitude -117.8844 (W).[20:50:54 GMT-08:00 05 Mar 2026] (626) 476-5019: The user requests help with a CAR OR VEHICLE ISSUE emergency.This request is for ME.The specific emergency is VEHICLE CRASH.NO ONE is trapped.The person in need IS NOT injured.The user's iPhone has its default language set to CHINESE.PSAP systems may not render emojis/special characters correctly. Return messages will not be affected.Two-way text with the user is now available.[20:50:54 GMT-08:00 05 Mar 2026] (626) 476-5019: Responders may need to search an area extending at least 20 meters in all directions for a 95% chance of finding the user.The user's estimated altitude (HAE) is 331 meters. Responders may need to search 20 meters above and below this level for a 95% chance of finding the user.The user has cached Enhanced Emergency Data with Apple. QUERY ADDITIONAL DATA!The user's device battery state is 61-100%. Their verified phone number is +16264765019.[20:52:18 GMT-08:00 05 Mar 2026] Robin Mauldin has entered the chat[20:52:18 GMT-08:00 05 Mar 2026] Robin Mauldin: HELLO 911 . WHAT IS YOUR EMERGENCY ? Call initiated: 20:50:53 GMT-08:00 05 Mar 2026Phone number: (626) 476-5019"
